name: utilities_nodes
query:
SELECT node_id, name,
        type, pm.measurement, pm.timestamp,
        case when type = 'reservoirs' then 'oil-barrel' else 'water-damage' end as icon
    FROM utilities_nodes pn
    left join (
        select distinct on(sensor_id) *
        from utilities_metrics pm
        order by sensor_id, timestamp desc
    ) as pm on pm.sensor_id = pn.name
    order by name
